'''Colum Halpenny''' (born April 25, 1979) is an Australian-Irish former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s-2000s. He played at club level  for [[Parramatta Eels]], [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]], and [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], as a {{rlp|fb|wg}}, or {{rlp|ce}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>
